HomeStudent ID Card Portal

Student ID Card Portal

Official portal to download your digital student identity card.

Identity Service

Secure download of your Orphosys Foundation student ID card after verification.

  • Print-ready PDF format
  • Official QR code verification
  • Lifetime digital access

Portal Entry

Direct access to your institutional records.
